response.overview: In a dusty rural town where nothing exciting ever happens, the residents are stunned when a string of unusual and mysterious murders shakes the peace. The culprit? An elderly woman named Matilda Williams but known to her community as “Granny” an old retired Military Nurse sharp-eyed, foul-mouthed, and a deadly individual who is armed with two guns; one which is a 9mm handgun and the other an assault rifle. Granny who was cursed by a witch in her early teens could not control her cannibalistic behavior throughout the years and continue evading the police with her charm after creating many tragic crimes scenes while hunting human hands for her meals. Granny who has always been discreet in her evil doings is finally being exposed by a teacher from the same community who witnessed a tragic murder she has committed.
response.title: Bad Granny
